rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by adding missing annex blocks or closing unclosed annex blocks
Ensure all annex blocks are properly closed with a semicolon
Validate that all annex blocks are properly nested and closed within their respective components
generic_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by ensuring all annex blocks are properly closed and nested
Ensure all annex blocks are properly closed with a semicolon
Validate that all annex blocks are properly nested and closed within their respective components
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Component type annexes are the normal location for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equation declarations
Component implementation annexes are used for implementation-level bindings such as assignments when they are valid in that scope
anti_patterns: Do not add architecture to fix AGREE errors; instead, fix the root cause of the error
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex
Do not use AGREE scalar type names like 'integer' or 'boolean'; use 'int', 'real', and 'bool' instead
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
